name: Alaska Salmon Salad Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except for the black pepper and bread.
3. Season with black pepper to taste.
4. Spread the salmon mixture on half of the bread slices.
5. Place the remaining bread slices on top.
6. Cut sandwiches into halves or quarters.
Makes 6 sandwiches.
